steps.title: Spot the blending examples
steps.content: The passage cites Tanya Tagag and Pura Fé mixing Indigenous music with electronic or R&B, showing they blend rather than keep the styles separate.

steps.title: Apply the signal to the choices
steps.content:
Reject means to refuse to accept the idea of strict differences, which fits the blending shown.
The other choices either hide, replace, or merely note the distinctions, none of which matches the combining described.
That matches choice A — A is correct.
